attributes.description: Alerts when `listener_auth_errors > 0`. Authentication failures on any listener endpoint.
attributes.name: [Redis Enterprise OTel] Authentication failures detected

investigation_guide.blob:
## Redis Enterprise authentication failures detected

### What fired
Auth error peaks > 0 on a listener during the window.

### Why it matters
Auth errors indicate credential rotations, misconfigured clients, or unauthorized access attempts.

### Triage
1. Cross-reference recent credential changes.
2. Inspect source IP patterns for attacks.

### Remediation
- Fix client credentials / reset secrets.

### Tuning
- Fires on any non-zero peak.
